properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v1 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hold me in Your arms, Never let me go, I wanna spend the eternity with You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I stand before You, Lord And give You all my praise, Your love is all I need, Jesus, You're all I need, My life belongs to You, You gave Your life for me, Your grace is all I need, Jesus, You're all I need.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And now that You're near, Everything is different, Everything's so different, Lord And I know I'm not the same, My life You've changed, And I wanna be with You, I wanna be with You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now You're near, Everything is different, Everything's so different, Lord And I know I'm not the same, My life You've changed And I wanna be with You, I wanna be with You.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I will sing for You always, yeah 'Cause in Your presence God is where I wanna stay.
